sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n47774" key="qalassopo/ros" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">θᾰλασσο-πόρος</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ον</itype>, <sense id="n47774.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">sea-faring,</tr_> <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">AP</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">6.27.7</biblScope> </bibl> (<bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Theaet.</author> </bibl>), <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg1708.tlg001:9:376" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">9.376</biblScope> </bibl>; <cit TEIform="cit"> <quote_ lang="greek" TEIform="quote">ὑμέναιοι</quote_> <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0576.tlg001:2" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Musae.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">2</biblScope></bibl></cit>.</sense> </entryFree>
